subject: Re: Scheduled maintenace
body:
remind me again in april


----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Sent: Sunday, March 4, 2007 5:02:25 PM
Subject: Scheduled maintenace


Jeffrey,
Gulfstream IIB.
Morrison as a slot May 14th to complete paint and Satilite phone install on G2B. (3 to 4 weeks downtime.)
 
Boeing 727
Boeing has a "C" due no later that Oct 31st. / coupled with and upper lobe check.
its a big one, the entire interior has to be remove to inspect upper lobe of fuselage.
We are saying 6 weeks down time.
Morrsion is shopping e facility that can accomplish work, Jacksonville, Houston, and Miami. (estimate price is in the 600k area.
 
just FYI
LV
